text: A pastoral classical song at a brisk 145 bpm, featuring string quartet, with a melodic viola counter-line, in alternating-section form, with a contrasting middle section in the relative minor, (no vocals; the lead is the instrument named below).

lyrics:
I learned a new chord progression
for a song I am not writing
winter is six months long
then it is over
text: A sun-soaked pop tune a slow, featuring warm bass groove with strummed acoustic guitar. Lyrics in English.
